catalogData.name: Sight
properties: Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Vision Enhancement
powers.raw: Vision Enhancement (Trait): Sprit and you gain Flare Compensation, Low-Light, Thermographic, Ultrasound, and Vision Magnification
powers.text: Sprit and you gain Flare Compensation, Low-Light, Thermographic, Ultrasound, and Vision Magnification

powers.name: Aid Mysticism
powers.raw: Aid Mysticism (Sustained): Target gains +Force/2 on Psychometry or Remote Sensing Drain test
powers.text: Target gains +Force/2 on Psychometry or Remote Sensing Drain test

powers.name: Animal Form
powers.raw: Animal Form (Major Action, Sustained): Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.
powers.text: Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.

powers.name: Astral Vision
powers.raw: Astral Vision (Complex Action, Sustained (Force) Minutes): Targets sees into astral plane
powers.text: Minutes): Targets sees into astral plane

powers.name: Bombard Senses
powers.raw: Bombard Senses (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Chaos at Force, but must sustain
powers.text: Cast Chaos at Force, but must sustain

powers.name: Farsight
powers.raw: Farsight (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Clairaudience and Clairvoyance at Force targeting same location
powers.text: Cast Clairaudience and Clairvoyance at Force targeting same location

powers.name: Primary Spell
powers.raw: Primary Spell (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Combat Sense at Force

powers.name: Skill Guidance
powers.raw: Skill Guidance (Complex Action, Sustained): Target gains +2 augmentation bonus to Insight or Perception if unaugmented skill ≤ Force
powers.text: Target gains +2 augmentation bonus to Insight or Perception if unaugmented skill ≤ Force

greatFormPowers.name: Knowing Mind
greatFormPowers.raw: Knowing Mind (Complex Action, Sustained): Use Remote Sensing in 1 Complex Action at no cost or cast any Detection spell at Force
greatFormPowers.text: Use Remote Sensing in 1 Complex Action at no cost or cast any Detection spell at Force
